race.comment: MR KIMBLE (8) is knocking on the door and looks well placed. He wasn't far away last time out at Murray Bridge despite finishing fifth in what looks a stronger maiden. He'd placed in two runs prior and with even luck early from the wide gate he'll take catching. KAYLA KRUZEN (11) lifted strongly but just failed to pick up the winner last start over 1200m at Murray Bridge, beating home MR KIMBLE. She did start a big price there but is going very well and has claims despite another drawing wide. LIVE FOREVER (7) is a three-start maiden who finished ninth at his most recent outing over 1400m at Ballarat after he got a long way back in the run. Resumes off a short spell for a new yard here and will find this easier, respecting. HERE SHE IS (10) is going okay of late and should get a nice run from the inside gate. KAPPA (5) is a Brazen Beau gelding on debut who can figure.
